author: Zaid
content: Printers are notoriously hard to work with, but this app takes out all the friction. Good tools are underappreciated because they don't really give you friction to think about, but I really appreciate the effort put into this app. Nobody forced them to add the ability to create documents from batch scans with the ability to replace and edit pages, or other useful non-essential features, but they did. Thank you.

content: App is trash now. Won't even open. Tried uninstalling, making sure it's updated, closing it and opening it, clearing the cache and nothing works. Fix your app HP!!!!

author: Alan Andreasen
content: Must sign in to print! I'm not creating another login and password just to print one page. HP SMART was a much better app and you didn't need an HP account to use it. Do yourself a favor and throw away all your HP (printer) products.

author: Trash Boii
content: Garbage fire service and garbage fire printers. Not only does the app not properly track your ink levels but when you try to print anything at all it forces you to go through a SERVER that then sends it to your printer. If that server is down, good luck printing! The app constantly disconnects from printers and customer support is worthless! I have been fighting my printer for 3 years and today I smashed it on the ground after 5 errors. Do not use HP printers. Get a refund.

author: Yanko Greshkov
content: Words cannot describe how bad this is. I really enjoy not being able to just turn it on, connect it. and then print. I love having to make an account and manually set up a new printer every time I need something done and then manually entering my Wi-Fi password. I love the blinking of the Wi-fi icon only to tell me the printer cannot be added, but it's clearly recognised by the app. Just love it. I love selling my data, I love making new accounts, I love having to take me half an hour to print.
